name: Sentra Telegram
description: Connect Telegram chats to your Sentra agents

tools.name: telegram_list_chats
tools.description: List known Telegram chats the bot has interacted with. Can filter by username or chat type. Use this to discover chat IDs before sending messages.

tools.name: telegram_get_chat_history
tools.description: Retrieve recent messages from the plugin's local message log for a given Telegram chat.

tools.name: telegram_send
tools.description: Send a message to a Telegram chat. Supports text and reply_markup for inline keyboards.

tools.name: telegram_send_file
tools.description: Upload a file (photo or document) to a Telegram chat. Reads files from Sentra artifact paths.

tools.name: telegram_set_reaction
tools.description: Set an emoji reaction on a Telegram message. Can also remove a reaction by omitting the emoji.

routes.name: health
routes.description: Health check — returns webhook registration status
